title: Double Slabs
description: Allows for 50 new blocks by simply placing two slabs on top of one another to create a new texture!
body:
### What is it?
This pack aims to add new blocks to the game through the use of double slabs. Simply put two slabs on top of one another and BOOM! you've got yourself a new block.
_(Copper blocks not included)_
### How does it work?
The pack uses vanilla friendly blockstates **(NO Optifine needed)** to tell the game to use a different texture when a block is in a certain state (aka when two slabs are on top of eachother)
### Compatibility
This pack will work with any other resource pack as long as it is at the top of the resource pack selection screen
# ![All the new textures possible with Double Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29dec3de69113c14b24a2d4f81c331ed1b141e93.png)
